app.title: TrailStats
app.disclaimer: TrailStats is not affiliated with or endorsed by Strava, Inc., Garmin Ltd., Apple Inc. or Polar Electro Oy. "Strava", "Garmin", "Apple Health" and "Polar" are trademarks of their respective owners.

upload.dropzone: Drop your export ZIP here, or click to browse — Strava, Garmin, Apple Health, Polar and more
upload.purgeConfirm: Remove your stored activities from this browser? This cannot be undone.

error.invalidZip: This doesn't look like a supported export. Make sure it's the full ZIP you downloaded from Strava, Garmin, Apple Health, Polar or another supported platform.
error.noActivities: Couldn't find activities in this export.
error.clearFailed: Couldn't delete your stored activities. Try again or clear this site's data from your browser settings.
error.saveFailed: Your data couldn't be saved locally and will be lost when you close the tab.

upload.discarded: {{count}} rows could not be read and were skipped.

info.activities: Total number of activities recorded in the selected period.
info.distance: Total kilometres covered across all your activities.
info.movingTime: Total time spent moving. Stops and rests are not counted.
info.elevation: Total metres of positive elevation gain — the sum of every climb.
info.avgHr: Average heart rate across all activities, weighted by duration. Only activities with heart rate data are counted.
info.calories: Total estimated calories burned across all activities with calorie data.
info.currentStreak: Consecutive weeks with at least one activity up to today. One week with no activity resets it to zero.
info.longestStreak: The longest streak of consecutive active weeks in your entire history.
info.bestWeek: The week with the most kilometres in your entire history.
info.bestMonth: The month with the most kilometres in your entire history.
info.bestPace: Your fastest average pace over this distance, taken from your best activity.
info.raceTime: Estimated finish time based on your best effort, using the Riegel formula. Times marked as Actual come directly from your activities.
info.eddingtonRun: The Eddington number E is the largest value such that you have done E runs of at least E km. E.g. E40 means you have completed at least 40 runs of 40 km or more. Invented by astrophysicist Arthur Eddington.
info.eddingtonCycling: Your Eddington number for cycling: the largest E such that you have done E rides of at least E km.
info.trainingLoad: Compares this week's training volume to your 6-week average. An index above 100% means you are training harder than usual.

racePredictor.title: Race predictor
racePredictor.subtitle: Based on your best effort at {{base}}
racePredictor.noData: A best effort at 5K, 10K, or half marathon is needed for race predictions.

paceZones.title: Pace zone distribution
paceZones.noData: At least 5 running activities are needed to compute pace zones.

fitness.title: Fitness & freshness
fitness.chartAlt: Chart of fitness (CTL), fatigue (ATL) and form (TSB) over time.

trends.title: Trends
trends.chartAlt: Distance trend chart. Use the button below to view the data as a table.
trends.yearOverYearAlt: Distance comparison between {{current}} and {{previous}}, aligned by period.

breakdown.title: Distance by activity type
breakdown.chartAlt: Donut chart showing the share of total distance per activity type. Use the button below to view the data as a table.

eddington.title: Eddington number
eddington.next_one: {{remaining}} more activity of ≥ {{target}} km to reach {{target}}
eddington.next_other: {{remaining}} more activities of ≥ {{target}} km to reach {{target}}
eddington.noData: Not enough activities yet to compute an Eddington number.

pace.title: Pace evolution
pace.chartAlt: Monthly average running pace chart. Lower is faster. Use the button below to view the data as a table.

load.title: Weekly training load
load.noData: Training load needs recent activity (within the last 6 weeks) to be meaningful.
load.barLabel: Training load index versus your 6-week baseline
load.caption: This week {{current}} vs {{baseline}} avg load units

dayOfWeek.title: Training pattern
dayOfWeek.chartAlt: Bar chart of total training distance by day of week.

histogram.title: Distance profile
histogram.chartAlt: Bar chart of activity count by distance range.

hrTrend.title: Heart rate trend
hrTrend.chartAlt: Monthly average heart rate chart. Use the button below to view the data as a table.

cadenceTrend.title: Cadence trend
cadenceTrend.chartAlt: Monthly average cadence chart. Use the button below to view the data as a table.

powerTrend.title: Power trend
powerTrend.chartAlt: Monthly average power chart. Use the button below to view the data as a table.

hrZones.title: Heart rate zones
hrZones.note: Based on avg HR per activity with fixed zone thresholds. Estimates only — not medical advice.

longRun.title: Long run trend
longRun.chartAlt: Monthly longest run chart. Use the button below to view the data as a table.
longRun.noData: At least 2 months of running data needed.

heatmap.title: Activity history
heatmap.noRecentActivity: No activity in the past year.

privacy.note: Everything runs in your browser. Your data never leaves this device.
privacy.heading: Your data stays with you

points.local: Your export is read and analyzed entirely inside this browser tab.
points.noServer: Nothing is uploaded — there is no server and no account. Your activities (including any heart rate data) are stored in your browser's local database (IndexedDB) and you can delete them at any time.
points.healthData: Heart rate is a health data point. TrailStats processes it only on your device — it is never transmitted anywhere.
points.activityNames: Activity names are free text — they may contain personal details. Like everything else, they are stored only in your browser's local database (IndexedDB) and never leave your device.
points.noTracking: No tracking, no cookies, no analytics. We never see your activities.

privacy.clearData: Delete my stored activities from this browser
privacy.verify: Don't take our word for it: open your browser's developer tools, go to the Network tab, and load a file — you'll see no data ever leaves your device.

demo.bannerText: You're exploring TrailStats with fictional sample data. Exit to analyze your own export.

disclaimer.estimatesOnly: Estimates for informational purposes only. Not medical or sports advice.

legal.copyright: © 2026 TrailStats — All rights reserved. Personal, non-commercial use only.
